Run this code:

print(json.dumps(data, indent=2))

description: Sequential 3-step — web_search + code_run + write

messages.content: Search for how to calculate Fibonacci in Python, then run the code for fib(10), and save the result to /tmp/fib_result.txt

fake_result:
def fib(n): return n if n < 2 else fib(n-1) + fib(n-2)
Example: fib(10) = 55
